message:
feat(pager): D2 ShardedPageCache with 128 partitions for thread scalability

Implements PostgreSQL BufMappingPartitionLock pattern to eliminate single-lock
contention on the page cache at 8-16 threads.

Architecture:
- 128 cache-line-aligned shards (#[repr(align(64))])
- Multiplicative hashing with golden ratio constant (2_654_435_769)
- Callback-based API: with_page(pgno, |data| ...) and with_page_mut()
- Per-shard metrics aggregated via global AtomicU64 counters
- Shared PageBufPool for zero-copy I/O

Integration:
- Replaced Arc<Mutex<PageCache>> with Arc<ShardedPageCache>
- All pager methods now use internal ShardedPageCache locking
- SimplePagerCheckpointWriter updated for new cache API

Tests (13 passing):
- 8/16 thread no_deadlock tests
- Shard distribution uniformity test
- Cache line padding alignment validation
- Throughput comparison vs single-lock baseline
- Cross-shard eviction test
- Concurrent same-shard operations

Bead: bd-3wop3.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
